["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","h2",null,{"id":"windowsmacos-用户","children":"Windows/macOS 用户"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"通过以下链接打开下载页面，选择所需的版本，下载独立安装包。"}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0"}],"
",["$r","h2",null,{"id":"debianubuntu-用户","children":"Debian/Ubuntu 用户"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"首先请安装依赖："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-1","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"然后信任 GPG 公钥："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-2","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["随后将下列内容添加到 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apt/sources.list.d/adoptium.list"}]," ："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[{"title":"操作系统版本","items":[["Debian 12 (bookworm)",{"release":"bookworm"}],["Debian 11 (bullseye)",{"release":"bullseye"}],["Debian 10 (buster)",{"release":"buster"}],["Debian 9 (stretch) (EOL)",{"release":"stretch"}],["Ubuntu 22.04 LTS (jammy)",{"release":"jammy"}],["Ubuntu 20.04 LTS (focal)",{"release":"focal"}],["Ubuntu 18.04 LTS (bionic)",{"release":"bionic"}],["Ubuntu 16.04 LTS (xenial) (EOL)",{"release":"xenial"}]]}],"templateId":"template-3","filepath":"/etc/apt/sources.list.d/adoptium.list","enableQuickSetup":true}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"再执行"}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-4","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"之后可以安装软件包，例如："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-5","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","h2",null,{"id":"centosrhelfedora-用户","children":"CentOS/RHEL/Fedora 用户"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["将下列内容添加到 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/yum.repos.d/adoptium.repo"}]," ："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-6","codeLanguage":"ini","filepath":"/etc/yum.repos.d/adoptium.repo","enableQuickSetup":true}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"再执行"}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-7","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"之后可以安装软件包，例如："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-8","codeLanguage":"bash"}]]}]
